availableClasses: Wildcard - evolves to any class needed

abilities.name: Campaign Penalty Base
abilities.effect: Decreases the chance to find food and better quality food by 50% in food campaigns

abilities.name: Food Campaign Bonus (on evolution)
abilities.effect: Increases the bonus to food campaigns by 100%, converting the base -50% penalty into a +50% bonus

pets.notes: Evolution requires 5 Wood and 100 Puny Food in addition to 100 growth. Total growth capacity is 420. Mouse is considered an Evolution Wildcard because its bonuses are independent of which class it evolves into. It can be evolved to any class depending on player needs.

availableClasses: Wildcard - can evolve to any class

abilities.name: Healing Boost (Supporter specialization)
abilities.effect: Increases the heal power and buff effect for dungeons by an extra amount based on class level

abilities.name: Fishing Qualification
abilities.effect: As a Water element pet, qualifies for the first slot of the Fishing Pond to enable auto-fishing

pets.notes: Evolution requires 5 Ice materials and 1 pet stone. Total growth capacity is 540. Frog has no campaign bonus. Frog is described as flexible - it can serve as either a Supporter or evolve as a Wildcard pet to fill other roles. It is particularly noted for its fishing utility due to water element.

abilities.name: Alchemist Crafting Speed Boost
abilities.effect: Increases item creation speed for alchemists by an additional amount based on class level

abilities.name: Honey Crafting (Token upgrade)
abilities.effect: With Pet Token improvement, Bee gains the ability to craft Honey (neutral crafting material). Crafting speed is multiplied based on accumulated Honey
abilities.formula: Crafting speed multiplier: 1 + (Honey^0.5)/100, capped at 4x (requires 90,000 Honey). Base crafting time: 15 hours

pets.notes: Evolution requires 8 Feathers and 1 pet stone. Total growth capacity is 600. Special evolution requirement: player must have 10 Mystic Garden upgrades before evolving Bee. Bee has no campaign bonus. Bee is noted as typically being the first Alchemist a player will evolve. The Honey crafting mechanic makes Bee increasingly powerful over time as Honey accumulates.

availableClasses: Can potentially evolve to other classes

abilities.name: Campaign Bonus
abilities.effect: Provides +10% effectiveness in item and growth campaigns

abilities.name: Single-Target Dungeon Damage Boost
abilities.effect: Boosts single-target dungeon damage by an additional amount per assassin class level

pets.notes: Evolution requires 15 Feathers and 1 pet stone. Total growth capacity is 800. Special evolution requirement: player must have the title 'Chicken God/Goddess' (obtained by fleeing from an Ultimate Being V2 encounter). Egg/Chicken has no regular evolution bonus, making it flexible for various class assignments. The pet is recommended for dungeon front-row positioning alongside Cupid and Armadillo.

abilities.name: Damage Absorption
abilities.effect: Increases the damage taken in dungeons instead of a party member by an extra amount per class level

abilities.name: Defender Protection Boost
abilities.effect: Increases the protect chance by 10% if your class is a defender

abilities.name: Total Battle Specialty (TBS) Critical
abilities.effect: Grants 100% critical chance on Total Battle Specialty

pets.notes: Evolution requires 20 Wood and 1 pet stone. Total growth capacity is 840. Armadillo has no campaign bonus. As a Defender specialist, Armadillo's job is to get hit and survive, prioritizing defense and HP over speed. It is noted as one of the easiest defenders to evolve early in the game, making it accessible for new players building their dungeon teams. Recommended for front-row positioning.
